text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
36 
LEADIS_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Learning Disabilities End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for learning disabilities as of 
the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: LEADIS_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: LEADIS_MEDICARE 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW
